overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walkthrough of a neon-lit nightclub. The player explores a VIP lounge, main bar area with holographic displays, and a back corridor with vending machines. The environment features vibrant purple and cyan neon lighting, futuristic cyberpunk aesthetics, and various NPCs socializing.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub entrance hallway with beaded curtains

agents.ego_description: walking through the nightclub entrance corridor toward the VIP section, following a patron ahead

notable_agents.action: person in leopard print jacket walking ahead into the VIP area

entered.detail: hanging black beaded curtains separating entrance from VIP lounge
illuminated vertical screen displaying Biotechnica advertisement with forest imagery
magenta and cyan neon strips lining the walls and floor edges

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow nightclub entrance corridor illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan neon lights. A digital advertisement screen glows on the left wall while beaded curtain dividers hang ahead, marking the entrance to the VIP section.

scene_state.functional_zone: VIP lounge booth with seating and bottle service

events.description: game UI prompt appears for item interaction with bottles on the central table

agents.ego_description: entering the VIP booth and approaching the seated group around the central table

notable_agents.action: man in vest and cap drinking from a bottle on the couch
woman in red pants sitting on the couch near the neon window

entered.detail: black leather couches lining the walls of the VIP booth
low table with alcohol bottles and glasses scattered on surface
tall rectangular neon light fixture glowing cyan and white

segments.scene_description: Inside the VIP lounge, the camera approaches a group of NPCs seated on black leather couches around a central table littered with bottles. A bright vertical neon window glows at the far end of the booth. At 21 seconds, a game UI prompt appears indicating an item interaction opportunity.

scene_state.functional_zone: main nightclub floor with bar and holographic displays

events.description: exits VIP area through beaded curtains into the main open club space

agents.ego_description: leaving the VIP lounge through the beaded curtains and entering the main club area with the bar

entered.detail: long bar counter with glowing cyan LED strip underneath
large cylindrical holographic display with rotating purple graphics
white modern bar stools lined along the counter

segments.scene_description: The player exits the VIP booth back through the beaded curtains into the main nightclub floor. The space opens up to reveal a long bar counter with cyan neon underlighting and a large cylindrical holographic display at the room's center. White bar stools line the counter as patrons mingle in the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub bar area approaching restroom corridor

events.description: turns left toward the restroom corridor entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar toward the restroom area, passing various patrons

notable_agents.action: woman in red boots and black outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'toilet' in white neon with gender symbols
additional bar counter with purple neon lighting and bottle display

segments.scene_description: Moving along the main bar, the camera passes patrons and approaches a neon 'toilet' sign marking the restroom corridor. The bar counter shifts from right to left as the player turns toward the back area, revealing a secondary bar section with purple neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: back service corridor with vending machines and restrooms

events.description: enters the back restroom corridor with cooler blue lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow back corridor past vending machines toward the Dream On sign

notable_agents.action: person standing near the Dream On sign at the corridor end

entered.detail: glowing white neon sign with 'DREAM ON' text and stylized D logo
white vending machine with red 'NC' and 'NCPD' text glowing
large illuminated advertisement poster for All Foods with cartoon mascot

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow back corridor with cooler blue fluorescent lighting and tiled flooring. A bright 'DREAM ON' neon sign glows at the far end above a doorway, while an NC vending machine and All Foods poster adorn the left wall. The space feels more utilitarian compared to the main club area.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to main nightclub floor near bar and dance area

events.description: exits the back corridor and returns to the main neon-lit club area

agents.ego_description: returning to the main club floor from the restroom corridor, rejoining the crowd

entered.detail: open area with purple lighting where patrons gather near the holographic display

segments.scene_description: Turning back from the corridor, the player returns to the main nightclub floor, passing the All Foods poster and re-entering the vibrant purple-lit space. The bar counter is now closer on the left as the camera moves toward the dance floor area with the holographic cylinder display visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit nightclub that transitions from an intimate VIP lounge to a sprawling main floor and finally into a utilitarian back corridor. It begins by moving through a narrow entrance corridor of purple and cyan light, passing a glowing digital advertisement before slipping through beaded curtains into a VIP lounge filled with leather couches and NPCs. As the camera exits the lounge, the space opens up into the main club area, revealing a long bar with cyan underlighting and a massive central holographic display. The scene then shifts toward the back of the venue, passing a neon restroom sign and entering a narrow, blue-lit service corridor featuring an NC vending machine and a bright DREAM ON sign. Finally, the camera turns back from the utilitarian hallway, re-entering the vibrant purple atmosphere of the main floor as it moves toward the dance floor and the distant holographic cylinder.
